title: Cmoothies
body:
# **THIS IS AN ABANDONED PROJECT**

# Old description:

Do potions seem too magical and hard to brew? Well, now you can have alternative ways to gain effects! As of 1.1.0, three kinds of new items exist for certain stages of game progression: Smoothies and Shakes (early game), and Blasts (endgame). Smoothies and Shakes give positive AND negative effects. Blasts take some of the player's health in return for a positive effect.

<details>
<summary>Crafting recipes</summary>
